channel.title: DAYHACK
channel.description: 每日追踪 Product Hunt 与 GitHub 热门项目，整理产品趋势、开源工具和效率应用。

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-14
item.description: TOP1 ClawTeams ClawTeams 【标语】：The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce 【介绍】：ClawTeams is an AI employee platform for e-commerce sellers. Instead of hiring special...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 ClawTeams



【标语】：The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce
【介绍】：ClawTeams is an AI employee platform for e-commerce sellers. Instead of hiring specialists—or doing everything yourself—you get a coordinated AI team that thinks, plans, and executes like real employees. One goal. One team. Zero micromanagement. Tell your team lead what you want—"Increase Q4 revenue by 20%"—and they break it down, assign specialists, and run the plan. You get updates in Slack or Discord. High-stakes decisions wait for your approval. Everything else just happens.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：team,AI,goal,specialists,get,your
票数： 🔺723
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月14日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-13
item.description: TOP1 AgentKey AgentKey 【标语】：One-stop live data marketplace for your agent 【介绍】：AgentKey is a plugin that connects your agent to live external data in one command. Install it int...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 AgentKey



【标语】：One-stop live data marketplace for your agent
【介绍】：AgentKey is a plugin that connects your agent to live external data in one command. Install it into Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, or any MCP-based agent and instantly unlock access to search, web pages, social platforms, finance, e-commerce, business and crypto data. No integrations. No setup. Auto failover keeps workflows running.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：data,live,your,agent,No,stop
票数： 🔺650
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月13日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-12
item.description: TOP1 Miora Miora 【标语】：Scale your creativity on editable canvas with agent memory 【介绍】：Not another AI image tool. Miora is an Agentic Creative Studio with Memory. Bring one idea,...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 Miora



【标语】：Scale your creativity on editable canvas with agent memory
【介绍】：Not another AI image tool. Miora is an Agentic Creative Studio with Memory. Bring one idea, generate multimodal assets on one editable canvas, turn auto-built memory into a reusable Skill, then create more, always true to your taste. One person, a whole creative studio.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：your,editable,canvas,Scale,creativity,agent
票数： 🔺567
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月12日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-11
item.description: TOP1 Effects SDK Effects SDK 【标语】：AI video & audio effects SDK for real-time apps 【介绍】：Effects SDK helps developers add production-ready AI video and audio effects to web, deskt...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 Effects SDK



【标语】：AI video & audio effects SDK for real-time apps
【介绍】：Effects SDK helps developers add production-ready AI video and audio effects to web, desktop, and mobile apps. Add background blur, virtual backgrounds, smart framing, lighting correction, beautification, overlays, avatars, and real-time noise suppression — all running client-side, without sending video or audio to our servers.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：video,audio,AI,effects,SDK,real
票数： 🔺459
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月11日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-10
item.description: TOP1 ChatCut ChatCut 【标语】：Your AI video editor in ChatGPT, desktop, and web 【介绍】：ChatCut is a lightweight, professional-grade AI video editor anyone can use, even without editin...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 ChatCut



【标语】：Your AI video editor in ChatGPT, desktop, and web
【介绍】：ChatCut is a lightweight, professional-grade AI video editor anyone can use, even without editing experience. It’s like having a personal video editing assistant that understands your footage, intent, and timeline. Make structural edits, fine-tune cuts, add captions, B-roll, music, voiceover, motion graphics, stock footage, and AI-generated video in one place. Every edit stays editable on a real timeline, with XML export when you want to keep working elsewhere.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：video,AI,editor,editing,footage,timeline
票数： 🔺668
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月10日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-09
item.description: TOP1 Auriko Auriko 【标语】：Trading desk for LLM calls 【介绍】：Auriko treats LLM providers as trading venues and arbitrages the spread. Built by ex-quant traders, Auriko’s cost-arbitra...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 Auriko



【标语】：Trading desk for LLM calls
【介绍】：Auriko treats LLM providers as trading venues and arbitrages the spread. Built by ex-quant traders, Auriko’s cost-arbitrage engine calibrates to each user’s request patterns and selects optimized inference paths based on token price, cache behavior, latency, reliability, and request quality. Auriko benchmarks show average 30% cost reduction against industry peers and direct providers. See the source: https://www.auriko.ai/reports/llm-cost-arbitrage
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：cost,LLM,providers,Auriko,arbitrage,request
票数： 🔺555
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月09日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-08
item.description: TOP1 ExploreYC ExploreYC 【标语】：Open-source API for Y Combinator & a16z company data 【介绍】：One open-source API for startup data across Y Combinator AND a16z - 6,600+ companies with...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 ExploreYC



【标语】：Open-source API for Y Combinator & a16z company data
【介绍】：One open-source API for startup data across Y Combinator AND a16z - 6,600+ companies with funding, stage, IPO/M&A exits, and founders. Filter by VC (yc/a16z/all), batch, industry, country, or search. Grab a free API key, read the docs (curl/Node/Python + Swagger), and build in 30 seconds. Plus the full web app: map, analytics, funding data, a live hiring board, and AI tools.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：API,a16z,source,Combinator,data,funding
票数： 🔺416
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月08日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-07
item.description: TOP1 Badge Badge 【标语】：AI agents collect peer reviews to generate proof of work 【介绍】：Badge gives an AI agent that collects peer reviews to build proof of work. For job seekers - ...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 Badge



【标语】：AI agents collect peer reviews to generate proof of work
【介绍】：Badge gives an AI agent that collects peer reviews to build proof of work. For job seekers - The agent connects to your contacts, requests anonymous reviews from your past colleagues, and builds a verified, portable trust score. score. For hiring managers - Badge gives you a 30 second reference checks on candidates, collecting authentic feedback from their actual coworkers to replace unreliable, AI-generated resumes and LinkedIn Recommendations.
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：AI,reviews,peer,proof,gives,agent
票数： 🔺451
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月07日 PM03:01 (北京时间)

item.title: PH今日热榜 | 2026-07-06
item.description: TOP1 AnySearch AnySearch 【标语】：受代理和开发者信任的实时结构化搜索 【介绍】：代理的搜索工具，而不是搜索框。人工智能代理的好坏取决于他们收到的信息。当连接到AnySearch时，您的代理会从并行搜索的可信来源中获得过滤、重复数据消除和结构化信息，帮助其生成更可靠的结果。自由开始。 【官网】：立即访问 【Product Hun...
item.content:encoded:
TOP1 AnySearch



【标语】：受代理和开发者信任的实时结构化搜索
【介绍】：代理的搜索工具，而不是搜索框。人工智能代理的好坏取决于他们收到的信息。当连接到AnySearch时，您的代理会从并行搜索的可信来源中获得过滤、重复数据消除和结构化信息，帮助其生成更可靠的结果。自由开始。
【官网】：立即访问
【Product Hunt】：View on Product Hunt

关键词：搜索,代理,结构化,AnySearch,代理会,开发者
票数： 🔺537
是否精选：是
发布时间：2026年07月06日 PM03:01 (北京时间)
